entries.title: INTRODUCTORY COMMENTARY ON JUDE on jude 1:17
entries.excerpt: Jude does not specify which apostles he is referring to, but many people assume he means Peter, James and John.

entries.title: Commentary on Jude on jude 1:17
entries.excerpt: "remember the words spoken beforehand by the apostles," those by Peter in the second Epistle, and by Paul in almost every epistle. From this, it is clear that this was written last after the apostles had passed away.
